item.title: He Hid His True Side From His Wife
item.description: A true crime story about a man who concealed his real life from his wife, revealing a hidden side that changed everything.

media:content.media:title: He Hid His True Side From His Wife
media:content.media:description: A true crime story about a man who concealed his real life from his wife, revealing a hidden side that changed everything.

item.title: A Perfectly Behaved Boy’s Tragic Act
item.description: A true crime story exploring the tragic act behind a boy known for his well-behaved image.

media:content.media:title: A Perfectly Behaved Boy’s Tragic Act
media:content.media:description: A true crime story exploring the tragic act behind a boy known for his well-behaved image.

item.title: One report that helped spark a movement
item.description: A single report to police became a turning point for a broader movement focused on justice and awareness.

media:content.media:title: One report that helped spark a movement
media:content.media:description: A single report to police became a turning point for a broader movement focused on justice and awareness.

item.title: Nearly Impossible to Keep Locked Up
item.description: A true crime case about a person who repeatedly challenged confinement and proved difficult to keep in custody.

media:content.media:title: Nearly Impossible to Keep Locked Up
media:content.media:description: A true crime case about a person who repeatedly challenged confinement and proved difficult to keep in custody.

item.title: If Only Someone Had Listened to Her Last Words
item.description: A true crime story centered on a victim’s final words and the missed warning signs that followed.

media:content.media:description: A true crime story centered on a victim’s final words and the missed warning signs that followed.

item.title: A personal story shaped by family
item.description: A reflective true-crime story about the hardest moments to share and how they shaped a family.

item.title: 9-Year-Old Found Alive After 17 Days in Bunker
item.description: A 9-year-old is found alive after 17 days held in a bunker, according to the source title and description.

media:content.media:title: 9-Year-Old Found Alive After 17 Days in Bunker
media:content.media:description: A 9-year-old is found alive after 17 days held in a bunker, according to the source title and description.

item.title: A teacher’s lies changed her life at 15
item.description: A true crime story about a 15-year-old whose life changed after her teacher’s lies, and the strength she showed over 38 days.

media:content.media:title: A teacher’s lies changed her life at 15
media:content.media:description: A true crime story about a 15-year-old whose life changed after her teacher’s lies, and the strength she showed over 38 days.
